title: PCB Orchestrator
description: Top-level PCB design orchestrator. Gathers requirements, delegates to specialized sub-agents, and enforces approval gates. Entry-point agent for all PCB design requests.
context: Delegates to: pcb-vision-parts (image analysis), pcb-parts-research (library resolution), pcb-schematic (schematic), pcb-layout-drc (layout + routing), pcb-finalize (quality + export).
